programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A newlywed couple looks for their first home in Chandler, AZ.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple leaves Detroit to provide their three boys with a new perspective on life in Iceland.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David helps a couple find a dream retirement home on the shores of Pamlico Sound in North Carolina.

programme.title: Mini Reni
programme.desc: Joanna transforms her parents' outdoor patio into a beautifully updated glass-enclosed room perfect for potting plants and enjoying time with family.

programme.title: Mini Reni
programme.desc: Joanna creates two very different looks that bring old-world character and personality into home offices for a husband and wife.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: The strange, the silly, the bizarre. When the unusual is caught on camera, be prepared for anything.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: From unusual encounters to sudden shocks and funny freakouts, these people were caught by surprise and scared silly.

programme.title: Rock The Block
programme.desc: It's week three and the teams tackle their main suites and make massive moves as some desperately seek their first win of the competition.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan work with minimalism in a rundown bungalow while letting loose with pink decor in the Modern Dollhouse.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An interior designer wants to buy her next house in Phoenix, and her colleague is along to keep her spending and design goals within reason.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Long Beach, California that sounds like the kind of project that has become their standard.

programme.title: Mini Reni
programme.desc: Joanna heads to New York for a special renovation. She blends warm, neutral colours to design a new office for Hoda Kotb with a fresh, modern feel.

programme.title: Small Spaces
programme.desc: Join James Koh as he meets with inspiring individuals across Asia who have discovered ingenious hacks to expand tiny living areas.

programme.title: Rock The Block
programme.desc: Ty Pennington challenges the teams with their toughest obstacle yet: transform a bonus loft space and staircase in only 48 hours.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: From bad ideas to carelessness and just plain not thinking, all our neighbours' fails, fiascos, and face palms are immortalised on camera.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Ideas that seemed good at the time. Practical jokes with unexpected results. Best intentions gone awry. Not everything turns out as expected.

programme.desc: An interior designer wants to buy her next house in Phoenix, and her colleague is along to keep her spending and design goals within reason.

programme.title: Hot Mess House
programme.desc: Cas and Wendell help a couple whose home has become a giant playroom for their kids and another family drowning in clothes and books.

programme.desc: A couple who loves to entertain needs help making room for their large guest list.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A biologist is moving his family to the south of France for a fellowship opportunity.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple looking for their first home hopes to find a steal in Idaho Falls, ID.

programme.title: Celebrity Iou
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan Scott help Hollywood A-listers express gratitude to people who have impacted their lives with surprise home renovations.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: A family who has spent a year crammed into Grandma's house is expecting baby number seven, and they need help building their perfect farmhouse.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take on a fire-damaged home, but they realise the only way to fix it is to demolish the house and start from scratch.

programme.title: Sin City Rehab
programme.desc: With a budget over $1 million, Alison takes on her biggest renovation yet with an Amalfi meets Palm Springs inspired theme.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: Ben and Cristi help two siblings transform a dated legacy home into a modern mountain lodge suited for their large family gatherings.

programme.desc: An interior designer wants to buy her next house in Phoenix, and her colleague is along to keep her spending and design goals within reason.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Long Beach, California that sounds like the kind of project that has become their standard.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Vermont mum moves her son to the Dominican Republic to learn about the other half of his family history.

programme.desc: A couple battles over price versus luxury in Tampa.

programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan Scott help Hollywood A-listers express gratitude to people who have impacted their lives with surprise home renovations.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: Ben and Cristi take on the senseless flow of a Nashville couple's house and bring the property's stunning river views into the home's interior.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: After recovering from a serious illness, a couple looks for an oceanfront home on Oak Island, North Carolina.

programme.desc: A home in Whittier, California is renovated on a short schedule for a quick profit.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen return to Talbott Street for their largest project on the block!

programme.desc: Zoe Saldana calls on Jonathan and Drew to thank her best friend of 15 years with a family home refresh.

programme.desc: The pressure's on to deliver as Alison's biggest reno in Vegas comes to fruition. Plus, she gets an offer to be on the cover of a local magazine.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A teacher and his sports reporter wife hunt for a home in the countryside of Surrey, England.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple is looking for a home in a kid-friendly neighbourhood in Tampa.

programme.title: Renovation Face-Off
programme.desc: It's Fix My Flip vs. Help! I Wrecked My House as Jasmine Roth and Page Turner go head-to-head to see who has the best ambitious addition.

programme.title: Two Steps Home
programme.desc: While working with two new parents, Mary pulls out her design tricks to set their home apart from the competition.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on a client who could help make or break their design business. They transform a living area into an open concept kitchen.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David helps a mother and her daughter reunite to find a home in honour of their late son and brother in Ojai, California.

programme.title: Ugliest House In America
programme.desc: A house where art has taken over the walls, a former church with a terrifying hole and a once-glamorous home compete for a $150,000 makeover.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: The guys take on a desolate duplex and transform it into a dream home. Keith sees this as an opportunity to create a chic, English countryside escape.

programme.desc: A home in Whittier, California is renovated on a short schedule for a quick profit.
